name: Apple-Streusel Gingerbread
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Good Housekeeping 11/94
Prepare Streusel Topping: In a small bowl, mix all ingredients until the mixture comes together.
Make cake: Preheat oven to 350°F. Spray a 9-inch by 3-inch springform pan with nonstick cooking spray.
In a large bowl, beat brown sugar and next 6 ingredients (baking soda, cinnamon, ginger, salt, ground cloves, flour) until blended. Beat at high speed until light and fluffy, scraping the bowl often with a rubber spatula. Reduce speed to low; beat in milk, molasses, and egg substitute. Beat for 1 minute. Stir in grated apple. Pour batter into pan. Crumble streusel over batter.
Bake cake in preheated oven for 55 to 60 minutes until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool cake in pan on a wire rack for 10 minutes; remove the sides of the pan. Cool completely. Garnish with apple slices and lemon leaves.
